message:
Add agent badge on session cards and Codex assistant label

Show 'codex' badge on session cards for non-Claude sessions.
Pass 'Codex' as assistantLabel through InfiniteMessageList to
MessageBlock for proper role labeling in Codex sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -53,6 +53,11 @@ export function SessionCard({ session, showUser, admin }: { session: SessionMeta
{formatDate(session.modified)} {formatTime(session.modified)} + {session.agent && session.agent !== "claude" && ( + + {session.agent} + + )} {showUser && session.user && ( {session.user}
